ransomware.label: Ransomware
ransomware.summary: Encrypted shares after lateral movement — follow ingest through response.

phishing.label: Phishing
phishing.summary: Credential harvest and session abuse — auth and triage chain.

insider.label: Insider threat
insider.summary: Privileged misuse and off-hours access — RBAC and UEBA-style signals.

supply_chain.label: Supply chain
supply_chain.summary: Tampered dependency or poisoned logs — validation and input abuse path.

ddos.label: DDoS
ddos.summary: Volume spike and geo scatter — monitor and map the flood.

challenges.prompt: 200 failed logins per minute from Russia on one account. Pick three modules in triage order.
challenges.explain: Start at the rule that fired (Brute Force), confirm origin on Geo Map, then contain via SOAR.

challenges.prompt: WAF logs show encoded quotes in POST bodies to /api/search. Which three nodes matter first?
challenges.explain: Validation shows what reached the server, SQL Injection is the detection, Alert Manager is where you ack and assign.

challenges.prompt: Audit shows POST /settings from a foreign referer while an admin was logged in. Order three nodes.
challenges.explain: CSRF report explains the class of bug, AuthContext owns session, API Client shows how tokens attach to writes.

tabletop.title: 3am brute force from foreign IP
tabletop.brief: Pager fires: five hundred failed SSH attempts from Romania against vpn-gateway. You have ten minutes to walk the deck path before shift lead calls.

tabletop.title: Ransom note on file server
tabletop.brief: Help desk reports .locked extensions on finance shares. Trace ingest, detection, and response nodes in order.

tabletop.title: Auditor flags bulk export
tabletop.brief: After hours, tier-one account exported ten thousand alert rows. Walk RBAC through audit response.
